name: vscode-window-flash-notify
description: 从终端 hook 通知本地 Windows VS Code 窗口闪烁任务栏图标 / Flash the local Windows VS Code taskbar window from terminal hooks.

commands.title: 窗口闪烁通知: 测试 UI 闪烁 / Window Flash Notify: Test UI Flash

configuration.title: 窗口闪烁通知 / Window Flash Notify

windowFlashNotify.flashUntilForeground.description: 持续闪烁直到 VS Code 窗口回到前台。/ Flash the taskbar until the VS Code window becomes foreground.

windowFlashNotify.flashCount.description: 当 windowFlashNotify.flashUntilForeground 关闭时请求的闪烁次数。/ Number of flashes to request when windowFlashNotify.flashUntilForeground is disabled.

windowFlashNotify.showInternalNotificati.description: 收到 relay 请求后同时显示 VS Code 内部通知。/ Also show a VS Code internal notification after receiving a relayed request.

scripts.compile: npm run compile:ui && npm run compile:relay
scripts.check: npm run check:ui && npm run check:relay
scripts.package: npm run package:ui && npm run package:relay
